taxonomy_reason: Internal coding-agent benchmark reported in the Kimi K3 release

rows.comparability_group_label: Internal · KimiCode / Claude Code / Codex (model-specific; see note) · Kimi K3 max; peer settings follow source labels
rows.protocol_note: All Kimi K3 results use reasoning effort max, temperature 1.0, and top-p 1.0. Depending on the benchmark, models are evaluated with KimiCode, Claude Code, or Codex. Kimi K3 is evaluated with both KimiCode and Claude Code; GLM-5.2 and Claude models use Claude Code; GPT models use Codex. All use max reasoning except GPT-5.5 at xhigh. Source label: Claude Fable 5 (max, with fallback); reasoning configuration: max; fallback to Claude Opus 4.8 on policy refusals where noted.
